name: GreyNoise
description: GreyNoise identifies Internet-wide scanners, bots, and background noise to help analysts focus on targeted threats. It classifies IPs as benign scanners, malicious actors, or business services.

actions.name: IP Lookup
actions.description: Get full context for an IP address including classification (benign, malicious, unknown), scanner details, tags, CVEs targeted, operating system, and business service intelligence.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to look up

actions.name: IP Quick Lookup
actions.description: Quickly check whether an IP is seen scanning the Internet with a minimal response payload including noise status and classification.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to look up

actions.name: IP Multi Lookup
actions.description: Look up multiple IP addresses in a single request (up to 10,000 IPs). Returns context data for each IP in the GreyNoise dataset.

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Array of IP addresses to look up (max 10,000)

actions.name: Community IP Lookup
actions.description: Free community endpoint to check if an IP has been observed mass-scanning the Internet. Returns noise status, classification, and last-seen timestamp.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to look up

actions.name: GNQL Query
actions.description: Search the GreyNoise dataset using the GreyNoise Query Language (GNQL). Supports filters like classification, tags, CVEs, organizations, ports, and protocols.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page

parameters.name: scroll
parameters.description: Scroll token for paginating through results

actions.name: IP Timeline
actions.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a specific IP address showing when it was observed scanning and what activity was detected over time.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to get timeline for

actions.name: IP Similarity
actions.description: Find IPs with similar scanning behavior and characteristics to a given IP address.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to find similar IPs for
